title: function returning decimal with fraction returns too large integer
bug_features_seed: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION foo(i INTEGER) RETURNS DECIMAL(18,3) AS (RETURN i / 3.0);
CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, value DECIMAL(18,3));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, foo(10));
key_bug_features: function returning decimal with integer division
